
# ΩQCS – BANK DD Ready (Integrated Architecture)

## Positioning

ΩQCS-BANK DD Ready is not a credit scoring engine.
It does not replace lending committees.
It does not generate credit recommendations.

It formalizes structural due diligence visibility.

## Core Integration Philosophy

DD-Ready is not a separate module.
It is embedded within the unified ΩQCS architecture.

Strategic Layer × Governance Layer × Institutional Layer × DD-Ready Layer
operate as a single decision architecture stack.

## Financial Connectivity (Embedded, Not Isolated)

The financial layer is internally mapped through:

- Internal Structural Modeling (12-variable core)
- External Coefficient Injection (M / C / R_ext)
- Structural Collision Detection
- Sensitivity Exposure Range
- Governance Clarity Reporting
- Audit Trail Persistence

This ensures institutional compatibility without regulatory overreach.

## Regulatory Alignment Principle

ΩQCS-BANK DD Ready:

- Does not calculate PD/LGD
- Does not substitute Basel internal models
- Does not provide lending recommendations
- Maintains Non-Prescriptive Architecture

It enhances transparency without entering regulated advisory territory.

## Enterprise Benefit

General enterprises using ΩQCS gain:

- DD-prepared structural reporting
- Governance transparency documentation
- Institutional-grade structural clarity
- Lending dialogue readiness

## Architectural Doctrine

DD-Ready is an embedded structural capability,
not a separate financial product.

ΩQCS remains unified.
